message:
test(rch-common): Add 31 new tests to mock.rs

- Added tests for is_mock_host and is_mock_worker functions
- Added tests for MockConfig builder methods and configurations
- Added tests for MockRsyncConfig variants and configurations
- Added tests for Phase enum equality, copy, clone, display
- Added tests for MockInvocation and MockSyncInvocation structs
- Added tests for MockSshClient health check, streaming, not connected
- Added tests for MockRsync retrieve_artifacts and failures
- Increased test count from 15 to 46

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
